headers.User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36

query_template.query: query SearchJobs($searchTerm: String!, $location: String!, $page: Int!) { searchJobs(searchTerm: $searchTerm, location: $location, page: $page) { jobs { id title company location description postedDate } totalResults } }
